FfiFailed(string).notice: Error for when an ffi command fails.

userdoc.notice: This contract is set into state using `etch` and therefore must not have constructor logic.         It also MUST be compiled with `0.8.15` because `vm.getDeployedCode` will break if there         are multiple artifacts for different compiler versions.
